title: Magrathea runstate
description: The durable record of a governed run, written by the runtime (a LATER sprint) and read by the dashboard live-task panel. This file defines the agreed shape so the two consumers cannot disagree. The dashboard NEVER writes it; on absence it renders a pending state. Canonical on-disk path: .magrathea/runstate.json (orchestrator-owned, outside every worker's writable scope).

status.description: running=work in flight; paused=limit-hit, awaiting reset (see paused_reset_time); blocked=escalated to operator; done=complete.

current_sprint.description: The spec directory this run is executing, e.g. '002-dashboard'.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last write.

task_queue.description: Every task in the run, in order.

thread_id.description: Codex threadId once dispatched; null while queued.

gate_result.description: The deterministic gate outcome (null until run).

in_flight.description: The single task currently executing, or null when idle/paused.

thread_id.description: Codex threadId to reattach on resume (Constitution VII).

checkpoint.description: Durable resume point: what is done, what remains. Free-form but stable.

paused_reset_time.description: When status=paused (limit-hit), the provider's known reset time the scheduler wakes at. null otherwise.
